textByHashes.afeb6bb1d10ba0c432ec545790671e9146a5297f: I was minding my own business in that abandoned shack for the night and suddenly I could hear...
textByHashes.bdfaee7332689d25be679580df36e9aae13fd92d: That was it... a faint sound... wind chimes...
textByHashes.12ff9bfce98b132e2c4c829de5dd94eff4488c15: What did I say about interruptions?
textByHashes.a36cd48f572dd546f507338d1fdb12b521d8e24e: The chiming grew louder and started to sound like the knocking of bones. I was in the bed hiding under the moth-eaten sheet - ignorance is bliss, y'know? - and suddenly the sheet was pulled off of me and there was
textByHashes.93468afb6e4d842715c66e72d1e6b5c5f9f0a47b: I SAID NO INTER- Oh yes, that's correct... Skeletons. Two of the blighters.
textByHashes.cadefdae0cfa1d4290f2ba5f9e7e0e8688704567: THE BONEY BLIGHTER BIT MY FOOT!
textByHashes.c6a18c31b8f3d9c6ae86012adb8a40b49bfff80a: A few pots, but without my tools they won'y do me any good.
textByHashes.a4ad5a9c0135486cc8bde513d033d854e572582b: Me? Just a tinker with nothing to trade.
textByHashes.fe2a871bf212e6e2ddcfad94a5edd5e6f18db695: A tinker doesn't get the respect that they used to... Gah! A thief took my bag in the night, they took everything.
textByHashes.f6e166aab320f462cf3d839d302d41d57ae70212: Bits and pieces, nothing too important I s'pose... An old pan flute, a dirty book and a charred skull.
textByHashes.d288a88265be4644db734beee17b85641c06ca45: That's all in the past now, anyway... I'm afraid I can't help you.
textByHashes.1918c9d55f719160d6de869aab7169a318d4224f: Didn't someone send you for the pots?
textByHashes.15c7cb07d87eb1100c83dd6becf60c5ffd4e05a2: Well, if anyone asks... I'm dead!
textByHashes.503bff3a667d43575742074f0687772e32a73a8f: Oh, me? Oh my... Goodness gracious what...
textByHashes.8f5a49cc9c460526b8fab297df2555e510414b36: Well, I s'pose that was me...
textByHashes.c8f8dd372b2761f1aafcc480db0c28983b64d4c5: How did you find me!? Was it you?
textByHashes.96a6fc1ff9c91df9cc02a296c45590128c886683: I remember this day... How could I forget.
textByHashes.5b8ac51521a3370dfb56321164d805e9ed7ba99f: Are you saying the man I sold those trinkets to was the king?!
textByHashes.2b007d08b4b1c7b40ae6140ec1cdf595fcad5ea0: Those were dark objects, corrupted with powerful magic. Dark magic.
textByHashes.043677e2fa9c62e1f2932298da5892c9d5db9fec: No, no, no... this ain't good. They'll find me.
textByHashes.c72d3bcd39a3ca891319e88deaa52cfac3e39a40: You already know too much. But you don't know my name. Good. Let's keep it that way.
textByHashes.9c798d36e77fb9b74fc77f96ea6e5ec652ec76b1: Then why are you handing it to me?
textByHashes.4fadc93e74a5b0fdda07fb5a674569e8295c2775: It's alright mate! We've all been there.
textByHashes.35435b2b2c2d5d494482693c56af185568a05f9c: It'll pass! Anyhow, I'll be seeing you.
textByHashes.d9f3f072a81b1d5a313e61f19bfed6f026fab651: I'm afraid I've nothing to trade for that.
